$comment: Conformance vectors for cronix HMAC-SHA256 signing and verification. Every implementation (TS @awbx/cronix-sdk, Go internal/auth, future SDKs) must agree on every vector. For 'sign' vectors, sign(opts) must produce expectedHeader byte-for-byte. For 'verify' vectors with expect='ok', verify(opts) must succeed and report expectedSecretIndex. For 'verify' vectors with a failure code, verify(opts) must fail with that error category. Bodies are base64-encoded so binary cases (NULs, non-UTF-8) are representable safely. Generated by ts/scripts/gen-auth-vectors.mjs — do not hand-edit.
